text.description: Standard text style for basic alert messages.

title.description: Bolder heading text for notification alerts.

text.description: Body text for notification alert content.

sm.description: Small badge label text for compact displays.

lg.description: Large badge label text for more prominent displays.

label.description: Text style for breadcrumb navigation items.

sm.description: Small button text for compact buttons.

md.description: Medium button text for standard buttons.

lg.description: Large button text for prominent buttons.

title.description: Body-sized text with strong weight creates clear card headers that stand out without being as dominant as page headings.

subtitle.description: Smaller than the title to establish hierarchy, using normal weight to differentiate from the more prominent title while providing supporting context.

content.description: Small, regular text creates readable content density within the confined card space.

footer.description: Extra-small text for supplementary information, creating clear visual separation from main card content and indicating its secondary importance.

label.description: Compact text fitting the small footprint of chips, ensuring they remain unobtrusive interface elements while still being readable.
Text style for all the items inside of a datepicker component

title.description: An H2 heading for dialog titles establishes their importance as temporary focal points that interrupt the main interface while still adhering to the structural hierarchy for accessibility purposes.

text.description: Standard body text ensures dialog content is highly readable, using the same styling as main content for consistency.

body.description: Main content text for expanded panels, consistent in size with other body content

caption.description: Text style for file upload component labels.

hint.description: Small text for short supplementary information.

label.description: Compact size for text-based input labels. They need to be easy to find and read but shouldn't draw attention to themselves.

user-input.description: Body-sized text for text-based user input.

hint.description: Small text for short supplementary information.

label.description: Body text size ensures these critical selection labels are clearly readable, as they contain the actual choices users are selecting.

hint.description: Small text for short supplementary information. Currently not in use.

text.description: Body text size ensures primary list content is clearly readable.

subtext.description: Smaller than primary text creates clear hierarchy within list items, distinguishing supporting information.

app-title.description: Large text that establishes brand identity and creates an anchor point at the top of the interface hierarchy.

horizontal-nav-cell.description: For text in the horizontal main navigation.

submenu-row-label.description: For navigation items within dropdown menus.

language-label.description: Small size that should be accessible but not compete with main navigation.

title.description: Large text that establishes the side panel's context and creates a clear entry point for this temporary interface element.

link.description: Text style for clickable links in footer.

legal.description: Small text style for legal text, disclaimers or information.

label.description: Text style for hierarchical navigation items in the sidebar.
Compact size for the component's helper text.

title.description: Body-sized text ensures contextual popup headings are immediately readable when they appear.

text.description: Slightly smaller than the title creates hierarchy within the popover while maintaining readability for this temporarily visible content.

number.description: Text style for numeric values on sliders

label.description: Body text size ensures these critical selection labels are clearly readable, as they contain the actual choices users are making.

step-number.description: Text style for the numeric step indicators in multi-step processes.

step-label.description: Text style for the step descriptions in multi-step processes.

header.description: Text style for table column headers.

cell.description: Text style for text-based table cell content.

label.description: Small text fits the compact nature of tooltips, providing just-in-time guidance without overwhelming the interface.
